프로젝트
정렬:
# 티어 안건명 기획 디자인 FE BE QA GMV 배포일 상태
0개 선택됨
📌 저장된 뷰:
0 🔴 미처리
0 🔵 진행중
0 🟣 검증중
0 ✅ 완료
0 👤 내 이슈
+ 이슈 N
고급 필터 ▾
📅 기간 ~
0개 선택
🔗 GitHub Actions Webhook 연동 ● 미연결
GitHub Actions에서 배포 상태를 자동으로 업데이트합니다. Webhook URL을 복사해 GitHub Secrets에 등록하세요.
📋 GitHub Actions 예시 (yaml):
- name: Notify Deploy
  run: curl -X POST ${{ secrets.DASHBOARD_WEBHOOK }} -d '{"bundle":"${{ github.ref_name }}","status":"deployed","env":"운영"}'
수동 테스트
// 웹훅 이벤트 로그가 여기에 표시됩니다
🗺️ 릴리즈 로드맵 버전별 이슈 현황
채팅
로그인 후 이용 가능합니다
로그인 후 이용 가능합니다
← 프로젝트 채팅
이슈를 선택하면 해당 이슈 채팅방이 열립니다
로그인 후 이용 가능합니다
← 이슈 채팅
Project Details
이슈 상세
🐛 새 이슈 등록
1 필수 4개 2 선택사항 3 등록

배포 관리

일정 수정
스케줄 등록
시작일
종료일
담당자
📥 트리아지 인박스 0
⚠️ 24시간 이상 미검토 이슈가 있습니다. 빠른 트리아지가 필요합니다.
⚡ 자동화 룰 Monday.com 스타일
조건이 충족되면 자동으로 실행됩니다. 토글로 활성화/비활성화할 수 있습니다.
마지막 실행 로그
⚡ 빠른 이슈 등록
💡 스마트 제안
🔍 ESC
이슈 제목, ID, 담당자로 검색하세요
↑↓ 이동↵ 열기ESC 닫기
📋 이슈 템플릿 선택
🏃 스프린트 보드
⌨️ 키보드 단축키
📌 전역 단축키
글로벌 검색Cmd+K
빠른 이슈 등록N
단축키 도움말?
검색창 포커스/
패널/모달 닫기ESC
실행 취소Ctrl+Z
🔍 Cmd+K 검색창
위/아래 이동↑ ↓
선택/열기Enter
? 또는 ESC로 닫기
📢
⚙️ 대시보드 설정
/* ── Kanban Drag & Drop ── */ .kanban-card.dragging { opacity:0.4; transform:scale(0.97); box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.18); } .kanban-cards.drag-over { background:rgba(99,102,241,0.08); border:2px dashed #6366f1; border-radius:8px; } .kanban-col.drop-target { background:#f0f9ff; transition:background 0.15s; } .kanban-card[draggable="true"] { cursor:grab; } .kanban-card[draggable="true"]:active { cursor:grabbing; } /* ── Dependency Graph ── */ .dep-section { margin-top:14px; padding:12px; background:#fafafa; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; } .dep-section-title { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#374151; margin-bottom:10px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; } .dep-chips { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:6px; margin-top:6px; } .dep-chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; padding:3px 8px; border-radius:12px; font-size:10px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; transition:opacity 0.15s; } .dep-chip:hover { opacity:0.8; } .dep-chip-blocking { background:#fef2f2; color:#ef4444; border:1px solid #fecaca; } .dep-chip-blockedby { background:#fff7ed; color:#f97316; border:1px solid #fed7aa; } .dep-chip-remove { background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; color:inherit; padding:0; font-size:10px; line-height:1; } .dep-add-btn { margin-top:6px; background:none; border:1px dashed #d1d5db; border-radius:6px; padding:4px 10px; font-size:10px; color:#6b7280; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; } .dep-add-btn:hover { border-color:#6366f1; color:#6366f1; } .dep-graph-canvas { width:100%; border-radius:6px; background:#f8fafc; margin-top:8px; display:block; } /* ── SLA Alert System ── */ .sla-banner { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:8px 14px; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:10px; font-size:11px; font-weight:600; } .sla-banner.critical { background:#fef2f2; border:1px solid #fecaca; color:#dc2626; } .sla-banner.warning { background:#fffbeb; border:1px solid #fde68a; color:#d97706; } .sla-banner.ok { background:#f0fdf4; border:1px solid #bbf7d0; color:#16a34a; } .sla-badge { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:3px; padding:2px 6px; border-radius:10px; font-size:9px; font-weight:700; } .sla-badge.overdue { background:#fef2f2; color:#ef4444; border:1px solid #fecaca; } .sla-badge.warning { background:#fffbeb; color:#f59e0b; border:1px solid #fde68a; } #slaAlertBar { position:sticky; top:0; z-index:100; background:#fff; padding:0 16px; } .sla-alert-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:6px 10px; border-radius:6px; background:#fef2f2; border:1px solid #fecaca; margin-bottom:4px; font-size:10px; cursor:pointer; } .sla-alert-item:hover { background:#fee2e2; } /* ── Subtask / Checklist ── */ .subtask-section { margin-top:14px; padding:12px; background:#f9fafb; border-radius:8px; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; } .subtask-header { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:8px; } .subtask-title { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#374151; } .subtask-progress { font-size:10px; color:#6b7280; } .subtask-bar-bg { height:5px; background:#e5e7eb; border-radius:3px; margin-bottom:10px; overflow:hidden; } .subtask-bar-fill { height:100%; background:#6366f1; border-radius:3px; transition:width 0.3s; } .subtask-item { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:5px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #f3f4f6; } .subtask-item:last-child { border-bottom:none; } .subtask-cb { width:14px; height:14px; accent-color:#6366f1; cursor:pointer; flex-shrink:0; } .subtask-text { flex:1; font-size:11px; color:#374151; } .subtask-text.done { text-decoration:line-through; color:#9ca3af; } .subtask-del { background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; color:#d1d5db; font-size:12px; padding:0 2px; } .subtask-del:hover { color:#ef4444; } .subtask-add-row { display:flex; gap:6px; margin-top:8px; } .subtask-add-input { flex:1; padding:5px 8px; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:6px; font-size:11px; outline:none; } .subtask-add-input:focus { border-color:#6366f1; } .subtask-add-btn { padding:5px 10px; background:#6366f1; color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:6px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; } .subtask-add-btn:hover { background:#4f46e5; } /* ── GitHub Webhook UI ── */ .webhook-panel { background:#f8fafc; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:10px; padding:14px; margin-bottom:12px; } .webhook-header { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:10px; } .webhook-title { font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:#1e293b; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; } .webhook-status { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; font-size:10px; font-weight:600; padding:3px 8px; border-radius:10px; } .webhook-status.connected { background:#f0fdf4; color:#16a34a; border:1px solid #bbf7d0; } .webhook-status.disconnected { background:#f8fafc; color:#94a3b8; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; } .webhook-row { display:flex; gap:8px; align-items:center; margin-bottom:8px; } .webhook-input { flex:1; padding:6px 10px; border:1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius:6px; font-size:11px; font-family:monospace; outline:none; } .webhook-input:focus { border-color:#6366f1; } .webhook-btn { padding:6px 12px; border-radius:6px; border:none; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; } .webhook-btn-primary { background:#6366f1; color:#fff; } .webhook-btn-primary:hover { background:#4f46e5; } .webhook-btn-danger { background:#fef2f2; color:#ef4444; border:1px solid #fecaca; } .webhook-log { max-height:120px; overflow-y:auto; background:#1e293b; border-radius:6px; padding:8px; font-size:10px; font-family:monospace; color:#94a3b8; margin-top:8px; } .webhook-log-line { margin-bottom:2px; } .webhook-log-line.success { color:#4ade80; } .webhook-log-line.error { color:#f87171; } .webhook-log-line.info { color:#93c5fd; } /* === Cycle 77: Triage Inbox (Linear-style) === */ .triage-panel { position:fixed; right:0; top:0; bottom:0; width:380px; background:#fff; border-left:1px solid #e5e7eb; box-shadow:-4px 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,.1); z-index:900; transform:translateX(100%); transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); display:flex; flex-direction:column; } .triage-panel.open { transform:translateX(0); } .triage-header { padding:16px; border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; flex-shrink:0; } .triage-title { font-size:14px; font-weight:700; color:#1f2937; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; } .triage-badge { background:#ef4444; color:#fff; border-radius:10px; padding:2px 7px; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; } .triage-body { flex:1; overflow-y:auto; padding:12px; } .triage-card { background:#f9fafb; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:8px; padding:12px; margin-bottom:8px; cursor:pointer; transition:box-shadow .15s; border-left:3px solid #9ca3af; } .triage-card:hover { box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.08); } .triage-card-title { font-size:12px; font-weight:600; color:#1f2937; margin-bottom:6px; line-height:1.4; } .triage-card-meta { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; font-size:10px; color:#6b7280; } .triage-actions { display:flex; gap:6px; margin-top:8px; flex-wrap:wrap; } .triage-btn { padding:4px 10px; border-radius:6px; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; font-size:10px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; transition:all .15s; background:#fff; color:#374151; } .triage-btn:hover { border-color:#6366f1; color:#6366f1; } .triage-btn.accept { background:#6366f1; color:#fff; border-color:#6366f1; } .triage-btn.accept:hover { background:#4f46e5; } .triage-btn.reject { background:#fef2f2; color:#ef4444; border-color:#fecaca; } .triage-empty { text-align:center; padding:40px 16px; color:#9ca3af; font-size:12px; } .triage-24h-banner { background:#fffbeb; border:1px solid #fde68a; border-radius:6px; padding:8px 12px; font-size:10px; color:#92400e; margin-bottom:10px; display:none; } #triageFloatBtn { position:fixed; bottom:80px; right:16px; z-index:800; background:#6366f1; color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:20px; padding:8px 14px; font-size:11px; font-weight:700; cursor:pointer; box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(99,102,241,.4); transition:transform .15s; display:none; } #triageFloatBtn:hover { transform:scale(1.05); } #triageFloatBtn .triage-float-count { background:#ef4444; color:#fff; border-radius:8px; padding:1px 5px; font-size:9px; margin-left:4px; } /* === Cycle 78: Custom Fields === */ .custom-fields-section { margin-top:12px; padding:12px; background:#f0f9ff; border:1px solid #bae6fd; border-radius:8px; } .cf-section-title { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#0369a1; margin-bottom:10px; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; } .cf-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:8px; } .cf-item label { font-size:10px; font-weight:600; color:#374151; display:block; margin-bottom:3px; } .cf-item input, .cf-item select { width:100%; padding:5px 7px; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:5px; font-size:11px; box-sizing:border-box; outline:none; background:#fff; } .cf-item input:focus, .cf-item select:focus { border-color:#0ea5e9; } .cf-repro-bar { height:6px; background:#e5e7eb; border-radius:3px; margin-top:3px; overflow:hidden; } .cf-repro-fill { height:100%; background:#6366f1; border-radius:3px; transition:width .3s; } /* === Cycle 79: Automation Rules === */ .auto-modal-overlay { position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);z-index:1200;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;display:none; } .auto-modal-overlay.open { display:flex; } .auto-modal { background:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:20px;width:min(560px,96vw);max-height:85vh;overflow-y:auto;box-shadow:0 12px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.2); } .auto-rule-card { background:#f9fafb;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:8px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px; } .auto-rule-card.active { border-color:#6366f1;background:#f5f3ff; } .auto-rule-toggle { width:32px;height:18px;border-radius:9px;border:none;cursor:pointer;position:relative;flex-shrink:0;transition:background .2s; } .auto-rule-toggle.on { background:#6366f1; } .auto-rule-toggle.off { background:#d1d5db; } .auto-rule-toggle::after { content:'';position:absolute;top:2px;width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;transition:left .2s; } .auto-rule-toggle.on::after { left:16px; } .auto-rule-toggle.off::after { left:2px; } .auto-rule-desc { flex:1;font-size:11px;color:#374151; } .auto-rule-desc b { color:#1f2937; } .auto-rule-exec { font-size:9px;color:#9ca3af;margin-top:2px; } #automationBtn { display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px; } /* === Cycle 80: Saved Views === */ .saved-views-bar { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:6px 16px; background:#f9fafb; border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb; overflow-x:auto; flex-shrink:0; } .saved-view-chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; padding:4px 10px; border-radius:14px; border:1.5px solid #e5e7eb; background:#fff; font-size:10px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; transition:all .15s; white-space:nowrap; color:#374151; } .saved-view-chip:hover { border-color:#6366f1; color:#6366f1; } .saved-view-chip.active { background:#6366f1; color:#fff; border-color:#6366f1; } .saved-view-chip .sv-del { background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;color:inherit;padding:0;font-size:10px;margin-left:2px;opacity:.7; } .saved-view-chip .sv-del:hover { opacity:1; } .sv-add-btn { padding:4px 10px; border-radius:14px; border:1.5px dashed #d1d5db; background:#fff; font-size:10px; color:#6b7280; cursor:pointer; white-space:nowrap; } .sv-add-btn:hover { border-color:#6366f1; color:#6366f1; } /* === Cycle 81: Release Roadmap === */ .roadmap-container { padding:16px; } .roadmap-version-card { background:#fff; border:1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius:10px; margin-bottom:14px; overflow:hidden; } .roadmap-version-header { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; padding:12px 16px; background:#f9fafb; border-bottom:1px solid #e5e7eb; cursor:pointer; } .roadmap-version-title { font-size:13px; font-weight:700; color:#1f2937; flex:1; } .roadmap-version-bar-bg { flex:1; max-width:180px; height:8px; background:#e5e7eb; border-radius:4px; overflow:hidden; } .roadmap-version-bar-fill { height:100%; border-radius:4px; transition:width .4s; } .roadmap-version-pct { font-size:11px; font-weight:700; color:#6b7280; min-width:36px; text-align:right; } .roadmap-issue-row { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:7px 16px; border-bottom:1px solid #f3f4f6; font-size:11px; cursor:pointer; transition:background .1s; } .roadmap-issue-row:hover { background:#f9fafb; } .roadmap-issue-row:last-child { border-bottom:none; } .roadmap-empty { padding:16px; color:#9ca3af; font-size:11px; text-align:center; } .roadmap-stat-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:3px; padding:2px 7px; border-radius:10px; font-size:9px; font-weight:700; } /* === Cycle 82: Workload Calendar === */ #workloadContent table td { transition: background .1s; } #workloadContent table td:hover { background: #f5f3ff !important; } /* === Cycle 83: Quick Capture === */ @keyframes qcSlideIn { from { opacity:0; transform:translateY(-20px) scale(.97); } to { opacity:1; transform:translateY(0) scale(1); } } #quickCaptureBtn:active { transform: scale(0.95) !important; } /* === Cycle 84: Bulk Actions === */ .bulk-cb { width:14px;height:14px;cursor:pointer;accent-color:#6366f1; } [data-issue-id].bulk-selected { background:#f5f3ff !important; } /* === Cycle 85: Cmd+K Search === */ #cmdkOverlay { backdrop-filter: blur(2px); } #cmdkResults > div:hover { background:#f9fafb; } /* === Cycle 86: CSV Export === */ #csvExportBtn:active { transform: scale(.95); } /* === Cycle 91: Stale Warning === */ .stale-badge { animation: pulse 2s infinite; } @keyframes pulse { 0%,100%{opacity:1} 50%{opacity:.6} } /* === Cycle 88: Sprint Panel === */ #sprintPanel { transition: transform .2s ease; } /* === Cycle 87: Template === */ /* === C102: Banner === */ #announcementBanner { transition: all .3s; } /* === C103: Aging Heatmap === */ /* === C104: Mention Dropdown === */ #mentionDropdown div:hover { background: #f5f3ff !important; } /* === C106: Settings Panel === */ #dashSettingsPanel { transition: transform .2s ease; } /* === Cycle 107: More Dropdown === */ #moreTabsDropdown button.tab { padding:8px 14px; border-radius:0; width:100%; text-align:left; } #moreTabsDropdown button.tab:hover { background:#f5f3ff; color:#6366f1; } /* === Cycle 108: Done Checklist === */ /* === Cycle 110: Home Widget === */ #homeDashWidget { animation: fadeIn .3s ease; } @keyframes fadeIn { from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-4px)} to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)} } /* Empty state improvement */ .empty-state { display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:40px;color:#9ca3af;text-align:center; } .empty-state-icon { font-size:40px;margin-bottom:12px; } .empty-state-title { font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#374151;margin-bottom:6px; } .empty-state-desc { font-size:12px; } /* === Cycle 116: Mobile Responsiveness === */ @media (max-width: 640px) { .tabs-container { overflow-x: auto; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; } .tabs { flex-nowrap: nowrap; min-width: max-content; } .tab { font-size: 10px; padding: 6px 8px; white-space: nowrap; } .issue-card { padding: 8px !important; } .issue-detail-panel { width: 100vw !important; } #homeDashWidget { grid-template-columns: repeat(3,1fr) !important; } #bulkActionBar { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; } .saved-views-bar { padding: 4px 8px; } .chat-container { width: 100% !important; right: 0 !important; bottom: 0 !important; height: 60vh !important; } #quickCaptureBtn { right: 12px !important; bottom: 60px !important; } } @media (max-width: 480px) { .cf-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr !important; } #sprintPanel, #dashSettingsPanel { width: 100vw !important; } } /* === Cycle 115: Quick Status Bar === */ .quick-status-bar { transition: opacity .15s; } .issue-card:hover .quick-status-bar { display: flex !important; } /* === Cycle 119: Keyboard focus on cards === */ .issue-card:focus { outline: 2px solid #6366f1; outline-offset: 2px; } /* === Cycle 120: Quick filter chips === */ #quickFilterChips button:hover { border-color: #6366f1 !important; color: #6366f1 !important; } /* === Cycle 121: Search History & Highlight === */ .search-history-dropdown{position:absolute;top:100%;left:0;right:0;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.1);z-index:200;max-height:220px;overflow-y:auto;} .search-history-item{padding:8px 12px;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:13px;color:#374151;} .search-history-item:hover{background:#f0f9ff;} .search-history-item .shi-icon{color:#9ca3af;font-size:12px;} .search-history-item .shi-del{margin-left:auto;color:#d1d5db;font-size:11px;padding:2px 4px;border-radius:4px;} .search-history-item .shi-del:hover{background:#fee2e2;color:#ef4444;} .search-match{background:#fef08a;border-radius:2px;padding:0 1px;} /* === Cycle 122: Comment Reply Threading === */ .comment-reply-btn{font-size:11px;color:#6b7280;cursor:pointer;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;border:none;background:none;} .comment-reply-btn:hover{background:#f3f4f6;color:#374151;} .comment-reply-indent{margin-left:32px;border-left:2px solid #e5e7eb;padding-left:12px;margin-top:6px;} .comment-reply-form{margin-left:32px;margin-top:6px;display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:flex-start;} .comment-reply-form textarea{flex:1;border:1px solid #d1d5db;border-radius:6px;padding:6px 8px;font-size:12px;resize:none;height:52px;font-family:inherit;} .comment-reply-form .reply-cancel{font-size:12px;color:#9ca3af;cursor:pointer;padding:4px 8px;border:none;background:none;} .comment-thread-tag{font-size:10px;background:#e0e7ff;color:#6366f1;border-radius:10px;padding:1px 6px;margin-right:4px;} /* === Cycle 123: Notification Bell Center === */ .notif-bell-btn{position:relative;background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;padding:6px;border-radius:8px;font-size:18px;color:#6b7280;transition:background .15s;} .notif-bell-btn:hover{background:#f3f4f6;color:#374151;} .notif-bell-badge{position:absolute;top:2px;right:2px;background:#ef4444;color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;border-radius:8px;padding:1px 4px;min-width:16px;text-align:center;} .notif-panel{position:fixed;top:56px;right:16px;width:340px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.12);z-index:9999;display:none;} .notif-panel.open{display:block;} .notif-panel-header{padding:12px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #f3f4f6;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;} .notif-panel-header h3{font-size:14px;font-weight:600;color:#111827;margin:0;} .notif-mark-all{font-size:12px;color:#6366f1;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:none;} .notif-list{max-height:360px;overflow-y:auto;} .notif-item{padding:10px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid #f9fafb;cursor:pointer;transition:background .1s;display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start;} .notif-item:hover{background:#f9fafb;} .notif-item.unread{background:#eff6ff;} .notif-item .notif-icon{font-size:16px;margin-top:1px;} .notif-item .notif-body{flex:1;} .notif-item .notif-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#111827;} .notif-item .notif-desc{font-size:11px;color:#6b7280;margin-top:2px;} .notif-item .notif-time{font-size:10px;color:#9ca3af;margin-top:3px;} .notif-empty{padding:32px;text-align:center;color:#9ca3af;font-size:13px;} /* === Cycle 124: Issue Dependency Visualization === */ .dep-section{margin-top:16px;padding-top:14px;border-top:1px solid #f3f4f6;} .dep-section h4{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#6b7280;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin:0 0 8px;} .dep-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;} .dep-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 8px;background:#f9fafb;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;border:1px solid #f3f4f6;} .dep-type-badge{font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:600;} .dep-type-blocks{background:#fee2e2;color:#dc2626;} .dep-type-blocked{background:#fef3c7;color:#d97706;} .dep-type-related{background:#e0e7ff;color:#6366f1;} .dep-id{font-weight:600;color:#374151;} .dep-title{color:#6b7280;flex:1;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;} .dep-add-btn{font-size:11px;color:#6366f1;cursor:pointer;padding:3px 8px;border:1px dashed #c7d2fe;border-radius:5px;background:none;margin-top:4px;} .dep-add-btn:hover{background:#eef2ff;} /* === Cycle 125: Bulk Label Assignment === */ .bulk-label-picker{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;padding:4px 10px;background:#f3f4f6;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;color:#374151;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;} .bulk-label-picker:hover{background:#e5e7eb;} .bulk-label-dropdown{position:absolute;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.1);z-index:500;padding:6px;min-width:160px;} .bulk-label-opt{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:5px 8px;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;} .bulk-label-opt:hover{background:#f3f4f6;} .bulk-label-opt input{accent-color:#6366f1;} /* === Cycle 126: Filter Presets === */ .filter-preset-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:8px;padding:6px 0;} .filter-preset-chip{padding:4px 10px;border-radius:16px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;background:#f9fafb;color:#374151;transition:all .15s;} .filter-preset-chip:hover{border-color:#818cf8;color:#6366f1;} .filter-preset-chip.active{background:#6366f1;color:#fff;border-color:#6366f1;} .filter-preset-chip.save-btn{border-style:dashed;color:#6366f1;border-color:#c7d2fe;} .filter-preset-chip.save-btn:hover{background:#eef2ff;} /* === Cycle 127: Header Metrics Strip === */ .header-metrics-strip{display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;padding:6px 16px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f0f4ff,#faf5ff);border-bottom:1px solid #e9d5ff;font-size:11px;flex-wrap:wrap;} .hm-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;color:#4b5563;} .hm-item .hm-val{font-weight:700;color:#1e1b4b;} .hm-item .hm-label{color:#9ca3af;} .hm-sep{width:1px;height:16px;background:#e5e7eb;} /* === Cycle 128: Enhanced Keyboard Shortcut Sheet === */ .kb-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:0 32px;padding:8px 0;} .kb-section-title{grid-column:span 2;font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#6b7280;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin:12px 0 4px;padding-bottom:4px;border-bottom:1px solid #f3f4f6;} .kb-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:4px 0;font-size:12px;color:#374151;} .kb-key{display:inline-flex;gap:3px;align-items:center;} .kbd{background:#f3f4f6;border:1px solid #d1d5db;border-radius:4px;padding:1px 6px;font-family:monospace;font-size:11px;color:#374151;box-shadow:0 1px 0 #d1d5db;} /* === Cycle 129: Detail Panel Tabs === */ .detail-tabs{display:flex;gap:0;border-bottom:2px solid #f3f4f6;margin-bottom:12px;} .detail-tab-btn{padding:8px 14px;font-size:13px;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:none;color:#6b7280;border-bottom:2px solid transparent;margin-bottom:-2px;transition:color .15s,border-color .15s;} .detail-tab-btn.active{color:#6366f1;border-bottom-color:#6366f1;font-weight:600;} .detail-tab-btn:hover:not(.active){color:#374151;} .detail-tab-content{display:none;} .detail-tab-content.active{display:block;} /* === Cycle 130: Accessibility & Polish === */ :focus-visible{outline:2px solid #6366f1 !important;outline-offset:2px !important;} .sr-only{position:absolute;width:1px;height:1px;padding:0;margin:-1px;overflow:hidden;clip:rect(0,0,0,0);white-space:nowrap;border:0;} button:focus-visible,a:focus-visible,[tabindex]:focus-visible{border-radius:4px;} .issue-card:focus{box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #818cf8,0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.1) !important;} /* Loading skeleton pulse */ @keyframes skeletonPulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.4}} .skeleton{background:#e5e7eb;border-radius:4px;animation:skeletonPulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;} /* Smooth transitions everywhere */ .issue-card,.modal,.panel{transition:box-shadow .15s,transform .1s;} /* Better scrollbar */ ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:6px;height:6px} ::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:#f9fafb} ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:#d1d5db;border-radius:3px} ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:#9ca3af} /* Empty state */ .empty-state-fancy{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:48px 24px;text-align:center;} .empty-state-fancy .es-emoji{font-size:48px;margin-bottom:12px;} .empty-state-fancy .es-title{font-size:16px;font-weight:600;color:#374151;margin-bottom:6px;} .empty-state-fancy .es-desc{font-size:13px;color:#9ca3af;max-width:280px;} /* Tooltip */ [data-tooltip]{position:relative;} [data-tooltip]:hover::after{content:attr(data-tooltip);position:absolute;bottom:calc(100% + 6px);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#1f2937;color:#fff;font-size:11px;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:5px;white-space:nowrap;pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;} /* === Cycle 131: Time Tracking === */ .time-track-btn{font-size:11px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #d1d5db;background:#f9fafb;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;color:#374151;} .time-track-btn.running{background:#dcfce7;border-color:#86efac;color:#16a34a;animation:pulse-green 1.5s infinite;} @keyframes pulse-green{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(22,163,74,.3)}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 4px rgba(22,163,74,.0)}} .time-log-list{font-size:11px;color:#6b7280;margin-top:6px;} .time-log-item{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;padding:3px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #f3f4f6;} .time-total-badge{font-size:11px;background:#f0fdf4;color:#16a34a;border:1px solid #bbf7d0;border-radius:8px;padding:1px 7px;font-weight:600;} /* === Cycle 132: Issue Clone === */ .clone-issue-btn{font-size:11px;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:5px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;background:#f9fafb;cursor:pointer;color:#6b7280;} .clone-issue-btn:hover{background:#f0f9ff;color:#0369a1;border-color:#bae6fd;} /* === Cycle 133: Issue Pipeline Bar === */ .pipeline-bar-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:10px;padding:8px 12px;background:#f9fafb;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #f3f4f6;} .pipeline-bar-stages{display:flex;flex:1;height:8px;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;gap:1px;} .pb-stage{height:100%;transition:width .4s;} .pb-stage.open{background:#94a3b8;} .pb-stage.in_progress{background:#f59e0b;} .pb-stage.review{background:#6366f1;} .pb-stage.done{background:#22c55e;} .pipeline-legend{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;} .pl-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;font-size:10px;color:#6b7280;} .pl-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;} .pl-dot.open{background:#94a3b8;} .pl-dot.in_progress{background:#f59e0b;} .pl-dot.review{background:#6366f1;} .pl-dot.done{background:#22c55e;} /* === Cycle 134: Issue Auto-Link in Comments === */ .issue-inline-link{color:#6366f1;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;text-decoration:underline dotted;} .issue-inline-link:hover{color:#4f46e5;} /* === Cycle 135: Issue Reactions / Voting === */ .reaction-bar{display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px;} .reaction-btn{font-size:12px;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;background:#f9fafb;cursor:pointer;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;color:#374151;transition:all .15s;} .reaction-btn:hover{border-color:#818cf8;background:#eef2ff;} .reaction-btn.reacted{background:#eef2ff;border-color:#818cf8;color:#4f46e5;font-weight:600;} .reaction-btn .rcount{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;} /* === Cycle 137: Sprint Progress Ring === */ .sprint-ring-wrap{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 14px;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:10px;margin-bottom:8px;} .sprint-ring-svg{flex-shrink:0;} .sprint-ring-info{} .sprint-ring-title{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#374151;} .sprint-ring-sub{font-size:10px;color:#9ca3af;margin-top:1px;} .sprint-ring-pct{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;color:#6366f1;} /* === Cycle 138: Issue Writing Assistant === */ .issue-assist-panel{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#eff6ff,#f0fdf4);border:1px solid #bfdbfe;border-radius:10px;padding:12px 14px;margin-top:10px;font-size:12px;} .issue-assist-panel h4{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#1e40af;margin:0 0 8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;} .assist-suggestion{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:6px;padding:5px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #dbeafe;} .assist-suggestion:last-child{border-bottom:none;} .assist-suggestion .sug-icon{font-size:14px;flex-shrink:0;} .assist-suggestion .sug-text{color:#1e3a5f;} .assist-apply-btn{font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border:1px solid #93c5fd;border-radius:4px;background:#fff;cursor:pointer;color:#1d4ed8;margin-left:auto;flex-shrink:0;} .assist-apply-btn:hover{background:#eff6ff;} /* === Cycle 139: SLA / Due Date Urgency === */ .sla-badge{font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;} .sla-overdue{background:#fee2e2;color:#dc2626;} .sla-today{background:#fef3c7;color:#d97706;} .sla-soon{background:#fef9c3;color:#ca8a04;} .sla-ok{background:#dcfce7;color:#16a34a;} .sla-none{background:#f3f4f6;color:#9ca3af;} /* === Cycle 140: Final Polish === */ /* Improved Cmd+K palette */ #_cmdk_overlay{background:rgba(17,24,39,.6) !important;backdrop-filter:blur(4px);} #_cmdk_box{border-radius:16px !important;box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.25) !important;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;} #_cmdk_input{font-size:15px !important;border-radius:10px !important;} /* First-run tip banner */ .first-run-tip{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6366f1,#8b5cf6);color:#fff;padding:10px 16px;border-radius:10px;font-size:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:10px;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(99,102,241,.3);} .first-run-tip .tip-close{margin-left:auto;cursor:pointer;opacity:.7;font-size:14px;} .first-run-tip .tip-close:hover{opacity:1;} /* Improved empty state */ .issue-list-empty{padding:40px;text-align:center;color:#9ca3af;} .issue-list-empty .ile-icon{font-size:40px;margin-bottom:10px;} .issue-list-empty .ile-title{font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:#374151;margin-bottom:6px;} /* Hover tooltip polish */ .issue-card .issue-actions{opacity:0;transition:opacity .15s;} .issue-card:hover .issue-actions{opacity:1;} /* Better modal transitions */ .modal{animation:modalIn .2s ease-out;} @keyframes modalIn{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(.95)}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1)}} /* === Cycle 141: Advanced Field Search === */ .adv-search-hints{position:absolute;top:100%;left:0;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.1);z-index:300;padding:6px;min-width:260px;font-size:12px;} .adv-hint-item{padding:4px 8px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;color:#374151;} .adv-hint-item:hover{background:#f3f4f6;} .adv-hint-item code{background:#f3f4f6;border-radius:3px;padding:0 4px;font-size:11px;color:#6366f1;} .adv-search-active{border-color:#6366f1 !important;box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(99,102,241,.2) !important;} /* === Cycle 142: Duplicate Marking === */ .dup-badge{font-size:10px;background:#f3f4f6;color:#9ca3af;border-radius:8px;padding:1px 7px;text-decoration:line-through;} .dup-of-link{font-size:11px;color:#6366f1;cursor:pointer;} .dup-of-link:hover{text-decoration:underline;} /* === Cycle 143: Burndown Chart === */ .burndown-wrap{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:10px;padding:16px;margin-top:12px;} .burndown-wrap h4{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:#374151;margin:0 0 12px;} .burndown-svg{width:100%;height:120px;} /* === Cycle 144: Issue Grouping === */ .group-toggle-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px;} .group-toggle-bar label{font-size:11px;color:#9ca3af;font-weight:500;} .group-select{font-size:12px;padding:3px 8px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;color:#374151;cursor:pointer;} .issue-group-header{padding:8px 4px;font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#6b7280;border-bottom:2px solid #e5e7eb;margin-top:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;} .issue-group-header .group-count{font-weight:400;color:#9ca3af;font-size:11px;} /* === Cycle 145: Quick Note Pad === */ .quick-note-fab{position:fixed;bottom:72px;right:18px;width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:50%;background:#fbbf24;color:#fff;font-size:20px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 2px 10px rgba(251,191,36,.4);z-index:8000;border:none;transition:transform .15s;} .quick-note-fab:hover{transform:scale(1.1);} .quick-note-panel{position:fixed;bottom:124px;right:18px;width:260px;background:#fffbeb;border:1px solid #fde68a;border-radius:12px;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.1);z-index:8001;display:none;padding:12px;} .quick-note-panel.open{display:block;} .quick-note-panel h4{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#92400e;margin:0 0 8px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;} .quick-note-panel textarea{width:100%;height:100px;border:1px solid #fde68a;border-radius:6px;padding:6px;font-size:12px;font-family:inherit;background:#fffde7;resize:none;box-sizing:border-box;} .quick-note-panel .note-footer{display:flex;justify-content:flex-end;gap:6px;margin-top:6px;} .note-save-btn{font-size:11px;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:5px;border:none;background:#f59e0b;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;} /* === Cycle 147: List Density Toggle === */ .density-toggle{display:flex;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;margin-left:auto;} .density-btn{padding:4px 8px;font-size:11px;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:#fff;color:#6b7280;border-right:1px solid #e5e7eb;} .density-btn:last-child{border-right:none;} .density-btn.active{background:#6366f1;color:#fff;} body.density-compact .issue-card{padding:6px 10px !important;min-height:auto !important;} body.density-compact .issue-card .issue-meta{display:none !important;} body.density-spacious .issue-card{padding:16px 14px !important;} body.density-spacious .issue-card .issue-meta{margin-top:8px !important;} /* === Cycle 148: Color Theme === */ body.theme-warm{--color-bg:#fffbf5;--color-surface:#fff8f0;--color-primary:#d97706;--color-primary-light:#fef3c7;} body.theme-warm .issue-card{background:var(--color-surface,#fff8f0);} body.theme-cool{--color-primary:#0ea5e9;--color-primary-light:#e0f2fe;} .theme-switcher{display:flex;gap:4px;align-items:center;} .theme-swatch{width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid transparent;transition:border-color .15s;} .theme-swatch:hover,.theme-swatch.active{border-color:#374151;} .theme-swatch.default{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6366f1,#8b5cf6);} .theme-swatch.warm{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#ef4444);} .theme-swatch.cool{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0ea5e9,#06b6d4);} /* === Cycle 149: Sub-task Progress on Cards === */ .subtask-mini-bar{margin-top:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;} .stm-track{flex:1;height:3px;background:#e5e7eb;border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;} .stm-fill{height:100%;background:#22c55e;border-radius:2px;transition:width .3s;} .stm-label{font-size:10px;color:#9ca3af;} /* === Cycle 150: CPO Final Polish === */ /* Issue card enter animation */ @keyframes cardIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}} .issue-card{animation:cardIn .2s ease-out;} /* Status badge polish */ .status-open{background:#dbeafe;color:#1d4ed8;} .status-in_progress{background:#fef3c7;color:#b45309;} .status-done{background:#dcfce7;color:#15803d;} .status-closed{background:#f3f4f6;color:#6b7280;} /* Priority dot */ .priority-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;margin-right:3px;} .priority-urgent .priority-dot,.priority-dot.urgent{background:#ef4444;} .priority-high .priority-dot,.priority-dot.high{background:#f97316;} .priority-medium .priority-dot,.priority-dot.medium{background:#eab308;} .priority-low .priority-dot,.priority-dot.low{background:#22c55e;} /* Tag cloud in overview */ .tag-cloud{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;padding:10px 0;} .tag-cloud-item{padding:3px 10px;border-radius:12px;font-size:11px;background:#f3f4f6;color:#374151;cursor:pointer;border:1px solid transparent;} .tag-cloud-item:hover{border-color:#818cf8;color:#6366f1;} /* Tooltip position fix */ [data-tooltip]:hover::after{max-width:200px;white-space:normal;} /* === Cycle 151: Acceptance Criteria Checklist === */ .ac-section{margin-top:14px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px solid #f3f4f6;} .ac-section h4{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#374151;margin:0 0 8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;} .ac-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;} .ac-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:6px;font-size:12px;color:#374151;} .ac-item input[type=checkbox]{margin-top:1px;accent-color:#6366f1;width:14px;height:14px;flex-shrink:0;} .ac-item label{cursor:pointer;line-height:1.4;} .ac-item input:checked + label{text-decoration:line-through;color:#9ca3af;} .ac-add-row{display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:6px;} .ac-add-row input{flex:1;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:5px;padding:4px 8px;font-size:12px;} .ac-add-row button{font-size:11px;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:5px;border:none;background:#6366f1;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;} /* === Cycle 152: Column Visibility === */ .col-vis-btn{font-size:11px;padding:3px 9px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;cursor:pointer;color:#6b7280;} .col-vis-btn:hover{border-color:#818cf8;color:#6366f1;} .col-vis-menu{position:absolute;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.1);z-index:400;padding:8px;min-width:160px;} .col-vis-opt{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 6px;border-radius:4px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;} .col-vis-opt:hover{background:#f3f4f6;} .col-vis-opt input{accent-color:#6366f1;} /* === Cycle 153: Load More Pagination === */ .load-more-btn{display:block;width:100%;padding:10px;text-align:center;font-size:13px;color:#6366f1;border:1px dashed #c7d2fe;border-radius:8px;background:#f8f7ff;cursor:pointer;margin-top:8px;font-weight:500;} .load-more-btn:hover{background:#eef2ff;border-color:#818cf8;} .issue-count-display{font-size:11px;color:#9ca3af;text-align:center;padding:4px 0;} /* === Cycle 155: External Link References === */ .ext-links-section{margin-top:12px;padding-top:10px;border-top:1px solid #f3f4f6;} .ext-links-section h4{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#6b7280;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;margin:0 0 6px;} .ext-link-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:5px 8px;background:#f9fafb;border-radius:6px;font-size:12px;margin-bottom:4px;border:1px solid #f3f4f6;} .ext-link-item .el-icon{font-size:14px;} .ext-link-item a{color:#6366f1;text-decoration:none;font-size:12px;flex:1;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;} .ext-link-item a:hover{text-decoration:underline;} .ext-link-add{font-size:11px;color:#6366f1;cursor:pointer;border:1px dashed #c7d2fe;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;background:none;} /* === Cycle 156: Smart Sort === */ .sort-select-wrap{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:12px;} .sort-select-wrap label{color:#9ca3af;font-size:11px;} .sort-select{font-size:12px;padding:3px 8px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;color:#374151;cursor:pointer;} /* === Cycle 157: Print Friendly === */ @media print { .notif-bell-btn,#_notifBellWrap,.quick-note-fab,#_qnoteFab,#_qnotePanel, .cmd-k-btn,.sidebar,.tab-bar,.filter-bar,.bulk-action-bar, button[onclick*="Modal"],.issue-actions,#_filterPresetBar, .density-toggle,.theme-switcher,#_densityToggle,#_themeSwitcher{display:none!important;} body{background:#fff!important;color:#000!important;} .issue-card{break-inside:avoid;box-shadow:none!important;border:1px solid #e5e7eb!important;} .modal-overlay,.modal-backdrop{display:none!important;} header{position:static!important;} @page{margin:1cm;} } /* === Cycle 158: Sidebar Collapse Toggle === */ .sidebar-toggle-btn{position:fixed;left:4px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);z-index:7000;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;padding:8px 4px;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:2px 0 6px rgba(0,0,0,.06);font-size:14px;color:#6b7280;transition:background .15s;} .sidebar-toggle-btn:hover{background:#f3f4f6;} body.sidebar-collapsed .sidebar,.body.sidebar-collapsed nav.sidebar{width:0!important;overflow:hidden!important;padding:0!important;} body.sidebar-collapsed .main-content{margin-left:0!important;} /* === Cycle 159: Resizable Detail Panel === */ .detail-panel-resizer{position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:4px;cursor:col-resize;background:transparent;z-index:10;} .detail-panel-resizer:hover{background:#e0e7ff;} .detail-panel-resizer.dragging{background:#818cf8;} /* === Cycle 160: Tab Header Badge === */ .tab-issue-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:#6366f1;color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;border-radius:8px;padding:1px 5px;min-width:16px;margin-left:4px;vertical-align:middle;} .tab-issue-badge.warning{background:#f59e0b;} .tab-issue-badge.danger{background:#ef4444;} /* === Cycle 161: Multi-Label Filter === */ .label-filter-wrap{position:relative;display:inline-block;} .label-filter-btn{font-size:12px;padding:4px 10px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;color:#374151;} .label-filter-btn:hover{border-color:#818cf8;} .label-filter-count{background:#6366f1;color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;border-radius:8px;padding:1px 5px;} .label-filter-menu{position:absolute;top:calc(100% + 4px);left:0;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.1);z-index:400;padding:6px;min-width:180px;max-height:240px;overflow-y:auto;} .lf-opt{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:5px 8px;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;} .lf-opt:hover{background:#f3f4f6;} .lf-opt input{accent-color:#6366f1;} /* === Cycle 162: Priority Inline Edit === */ .priority-inline-select{font-size:11px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:5px;padding:1px 4px;background:#fff;cursor:pointer;color:#374151;} .priority-inline-select:focus{outline:none;border-color:#818cf8;} /* === Cycle 163: Velocity Sparkline === */ .velocity-sparkline-wrap{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-top:12px;} .velocity-sparkline-wrap h4{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#374151;margin:0 0 8px;} .vs-row{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:4px;height:60px;} .vs-bar{flex:1;background:#818cf8;border-radius:3px 3px 0 0;position:relative;min-height:3px;transition:height .3s;} .vs-bar:hover{background:#6366f1;} .vs-bar::after{content:attr(data-val);position:absolute;top:-16px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);font-size:9px;color:#6b7280;white-space:nowrap;} .vs-labels{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-top:4px;} .vs-label{flex:1;font-size:9px;color:#9ca3af;text-align:center;} /* === Cycle 164: Environment Tags === */ .env-tag{font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:600;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;} .env-ios{background:#e0f2fe;color:#0369a1;} .env-android{background:#dcfce7;color:#15803d;} .env-web{background:#fef3c7;color:#b45309;} .env-api{background:#f3e8ff;color:#7e22ce;} .env-select{font-size:11px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:5px;padding:2px 6px;background:#fff;cursor:pointer;} /* === Cycle 165: Workload Warning === */ .assignee-overload-badge{font-size:10px;background:#fee2e2;color:#dc2626;border-radius:6px;padding:1px 6px;margin-left:4px;font-weight:600;} .assignee-ok-badge{font-size:10px;background:#dcfce7;color:#15803d;border-radius:6px;padding:1px 6px;margin-left:4px;} /* === Cycle 166: Comment Count Badge === */ .comment-count-badge{font-size:10px;color:#9ca3af;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;} .comment-count-badge.has-comments{color:#6366f1;} /* === Cycle 169: Copy ID Button === */ .copy-id-btn{font-size:10px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;background:#f9fafb;cursor:pointer;color:#6b7280;opacity:0;transition:opacity .15s;} .issue-card:hover .copy-id-btn{opacity:1;} .copy-id-btn:hover{background:#e0e7ff;border-color:#818cf8;color:#6366f1;} /* === Cycle 170: QA Debug Mode === */ body.qa-debug-mode .issue-card::after{content:attr(data-issue-id)' ';font-size:9px;color:#d1d5db;position:absolute;top:2px;right:2px;} body.qa-debug-mode .issue-card{position:relative;} .qa-mode-toggle{font-size:11px;padding:3px 9px;border:1px solid #fde68a;border-radius:6px;background:#fef3c7;cursor:pointer;color:#92400e;} body.qa-debug-mode .qa-mode-toggle{background:#dcfce7;border-color:#bbf7d0;color:#15803d;} /* === Cycle 171: Expandable Description === */ .desc-truncated{max-height:60px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;} .desc-truncated::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:30px;background:linear-gradient(transparent,#fff);} .desc-expand-btn{font-size:11px;color:#6366f1;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:none;padding:0;margin-top:2px;} .desc-expand-btn:hover{text-decoration:underline;} /* === Cycle 173: Mini Kanban Board View === */ .mini-kanban{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin:12px 0;} .mk-col{background:#f9fafb;border-radius:8px;padding:8px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;min-height:80px;} .mk-col-header{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#374151;margin-bottom:6px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;} .mk-col-header .mk-count{background:#e5e7eb;color:#6b7280;border-radius:8px;padding:1px 5px;font-size:10px;} .mk-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:5px;padding:5px 7px;margin-bottom:4px;font-size:11px;color:#374151;cursor:pointer;transition:box-shadow .1s;} .mk-card:hover{box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.08);} .mk-toggle-btn{font-size:11px;padding:3px 9px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;cursor:pointer;color:#6b7280;} .mk-toggle-btn.active{background:#6366f1;color:#fff;border-color:#6366f1;} /* === Cycle 175: Sprint Countdown === */ .sprint-countdown{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 10px;background:#f0fdf4;border:1px solid #bbf7d0;border-radius:8px;font-size:11px;color:#15803d;font-weight:600;} .sprint-countdown .scd-num{font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:#15803d;} .sprint-countdown.urgent{background:#fff7ed;border-color:#fed7aa;color:#c2410c;} .sprint-countdown.urgent .scd-num{color:#c2410c;} /* === Cycle 176: Assignee Performance Table === */ .perf-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;margin-top:12px;} .perf-table th{background:#f9fafb;padding:6px 10px;text-align:left;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#6b7280;border-bottom:2px solid #e5e7eb;} .perf-table td{padding:6px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid #f3f4f6;color:#374151;} .perf-table tr:hover td{background:#f9fafb;} .perf-bar-cell{width:80px;} .perf-mini-bar{height:6px;background:#e5e7eb;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;} .perf-mini-bar-fill{height:100%;background:#6366f1;border-radius:3px;} /* === Cycle 178: Activity Sparkline on Card === */ .card-sparkline{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:1px;height:12px;margin-top:3px;} .csp-bar{width:3px;background:#c7d2fe;border-radius:1px;min-height:1px;} .csp-bar.active{background:#6366f1;} /* === Cycle 179: Hover Preview Tooltip === */ .issue-hover-preview{position:fixed;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:10px;box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.12);padding:12px 14px;z-index:9990;pointer-events:none;max-width:280px;font-size:12px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .15s;display:none;} .issue-hover-preview.visible{opacity:1;display:block;} .ihp-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:700;color:#111827;margin-bottom:4px;} .ihp-meta{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;margin-bottom:6px;} .ihp-desc{font-size:11px;color:#6b7280;line-height:1.4;max-height:50px;overflow:hidden;} /* === Cycle 181: Pin Issue to Top === */ .pin-issue-btn{font-size:11px;padding:2px 6px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:4px;background:none;cursor:pointer;color:#9ca3af;} .pin-issue-btn.pinned{color:#f59e0b;border-color:#fde68a;} .issue-card.pinned-card{border-left:3px solid #f59e0b;background:#fffbeb;} /* === Cycle 182: Component Color Coding === */ .component-tag{font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:600;} .comp-auth{background:#e0e7ff;color:#6366f1;} .comp-payment{background:#dcfce7;color:#15803d;} .comp-ui{background:#fef3c7;color:#b45309;} .comp-api{background:#fee2e2;color:#dc2626;} .comp-db{background:#f3e8ff;color:#7e22ce;} /* === Cycle 183: Recent Issues Widget === */ .recent-issues-widget{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;margin-bottom:12px;} .riw-header{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:#374151;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;} .riw-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:4px 0;border-bottom:1px solid #f9fafb;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;} .riw-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;} .riw-item:hover{color:#6366f1;} .riw-id{font-weight:700;color:#6b7280;font-size:10px;} .riw-title{flex:1;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;color:#374151;} /* === Cycle 186: Status Donut Chart === */ .status-donut-wrap{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:10px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:12px;text-align:center;} .status-donut-wrap h4{font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:#6b7280;margin:0 0 8px;} .status-donut-legend{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;gap:6px;margin-top:8px;} .sdl-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;font-size:10px;color:#374151;} .sdl-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;} /* === Cycle 187: Mini Timeline View === */ .timeline-view{margin:12px 0;overflow-x:auto;} .timeline-view h4{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;color:#374151;margin-bottom:8px;} .timeline-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:4px;font-size:11px;} .tl-label{width:80px;text-align:right;color:#6b7280;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0;} .tl-track{flex:1;height:16px;background:#f3f4f6;border-radius:4px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;} .tl-bar{height:100%;border-radius:4px;position:absolute;display:flex;align-items:center;padding-left:4px;font-size:9px;color:#fff;font-weight:600;overflow:hidden;white-space:nowrap;} /* === Cycle 189: Roadmap Alignment === */ .roadmap-align-tag{font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:8px;background:#e0f2fe;color:#0369a1;font-weight:600;} /* === Cycle 192: Progress Field === */ .progress-field{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-top:6px;} .progress-field label{font-size:11px;color:#6b7280;width:50px;} .progress-field input[type=range]{flex:1;accent-color:#6366f1;} .progress-field .prog-val{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#6366f1;min-width:30px;} .issue-card .prog-mini{height:3px;background:#e5e7eb;border-radius:2px;margin-top:4px;overflow:hidden;} .issue-card .prog-mini-fill{height:100%;background:#6366f1;border-radius:2px;transition:width .3s;} /* === Cycle 194: Focus Mode === */ body.focus-mode .issue-card:not(.focused){opacity:.3;pointer-events:none;} body.focus-mode .issue-card.focused{opacity:1;pointer-events:auto;box-shadow:0 0 0 3px #6366f1;} .focus-mode-btn{font-size:11px;padding:3px 9px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:6px;background:#fff;cursor:pointer;color:#6b7280;} .focus-mode-btn.active{background:#ede9fe;border-color:#c4b5fd;color:#7c3aed;} /* === Cycle 198: Modal Keyboard Hints === */ .modal-kb-hints{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;padding:6px 0;border-top:1px solid #f3f4f6;margin-top:8px;} .mkh-item{font-size:10px;color:#9ca3af;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;} .mkh-key{background:#f3f4f6;border:1px solid #d1d5db;border-radius:3px;padding:0 4px;font-family:monospace;font-size:10px;color:#374151;} /* === Cycle 200: QA Score Summary === */ .qa-score-summary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1e1b4b,#312e81);color:#fff;border-radius:12px;padding:16px;margin-bottom:16px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;} .qa-score-summary::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:-20px;right:-20px;width:100px;height:100px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.05);border-radius:50%;} .qa-score-summary h3{font-size:14px;font-weight:700;margin:0 0 10px;opacity:.9;} .qa-score-main{font-size:36px;font-weight:900;color:#a5f3fc;} .qa-score-sub{font-size:12px;opacity:.7;margin-top:4px;} .qa-score-items{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin-top:12px;} .qa-score-item{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-radius:8px;padding:8px;text-align:center;} .qa-score-item .score-val{font-size:18px;font-weight:800;color:#c7d2fe;} .qa-score-item .score-label{font-size:10px;opacity:.7;} /* === Cycle 203: Issue Age Badges === */ .age-badge{font-size:10px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:6px;font-weight:600;} .age-new{background:#dcfce7;color:#15803d;} .age-recent{background:#e0f2fe;color:#0369a1;} .age-old{background:#fef3c7;color:#b45309;} .age-ancient{background:#fee2e2;color:#dc2626;} /* === Cycle 204: Drag Reorder === */ .issue-card[draggable]{cursor:grab;} .issue-card[draggable]:active{cursor:grabbing;} .issue-card.drag-over{border:2px dashed #818cf8;background:#f0f4ff;} .drag-handle{font-size:12px;color:#d1d5db;cursor:grab;padding:0 4px;user-select:none;} .drag-handle:hover{color:#9ca3af;} /* === Cycle 207: Ultra Compact === */ body.ultra-compact .issue-card{padding:3px 8px!important;min-height:auto!important;} body.ultra-compact .issue-card .issue-meta,body.ultra-compact .issue-card .issue-labels, body.ultra-compact .issue-card .age-badge,body.ultra-compact .issue-card .comment-count-badge, body.ultra-compact .issue-card .subtask-mini-bar,body.ultra-compact .issue-card .card-sparkline, body.ultra-compact .issue-card .sla-badge,body.ultra-compact .issue-card .health-badge{display:none!important;} /* === Cycle 208: Inline Assignee Edit === */ .inline-assignee-edit{font-size:11px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:4px;padding:1px 4px;background:#fff;cursor:pointer;} .inline-assignee-edit:hover{border-color:#818cf8;} /* === Cycle 212: Watchers Display === */ .watchers-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-top:6px;font-size:11px;color:#6b7280;} .watcher-avatar{width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;background:#e0e7ff;color:#6366f1;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:1.5px solid #fff;margin-right:-4px;} .watchers-count{font-size:10px;color:#9ca3af;} /* === Cycle 213: Overall Progress Bar === */ .overall-progress-header{padding:8px 0;margin-bottom:6px;} .overall-progress-label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:11px;color:#6b7280;margin-bottom:4px;} .overall-progress-track{height:6px;background:#e5e7eb;border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;} .overall-progress-fill{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,#6366f1,#22c55e);border-radius:3px;transition:width .5s;} /* === Cycle 215: Issue Type Icons === */ .issue-type-icon{font-size:12px;flex-shrink:0;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:4px;} .type-bug .issue-type-icon{background:#fee2e2;} .type-feature .issue-type-icon{background:#dcfce7;} .type-task .issue-type-icon{background:#dbeafe;} .type-improvement .issue-type-icon{background:#fef3c7;} /* === Cycle 221: Quick Create FAB === */ .quick-create-fab{position:fixed;bottom:18px;right:18px;width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#6366f1,#8b5cf6);color:#fff;font-size:22px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;cursor:pointer;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(99,102,241,.4);z-index:7999;border:none;transition:transform .15s,box-shadow .15s;} .quick-create-fab:hover{transform:scale(1.08);box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(99,102,241,.5);} .quick-create-fab:active{transform:scale(.95);} /* === Cycle 222: Story Points === */ .story-points-badge{font-size:10px;background:#e0e7ff;color:#4338ca;border-radius:8px;padding:1px 7px;font-weight:700;} .story-points-badge::before{content:'SP '} /* === Cycle 229: Context Menu === */ .context-menu{position:fixed;background:#fff;border:1px solid #e2e8f0;border-radius:8px;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.12);z-index:99990;padding:4px;min-width:160px;} .ctx-item{padding:6px 10px;font-size:12px;cursor:pointer;border-radius:5px;color:#374151;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;} .ctx-item:hover{background:#f3f4f6;} .ctx-separator{height:1px;background:#f3f4f6;margin:4px 0;} /* === Cycle 231-240 Combined CSS === */ /* C231: Tag count display */ .tag-count-stat{font-size:10px;color:#6b7280;background:#f9fafb;border:1px solid #f3f4f6;border-radius:6px;padding:2px 7px;} /* C232: Sprint goal text */ .sprint-goal-display{background:#f0f4ff;border-left:3px solid #6366f1;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:0 6px 6px 0;font-size:12px;color:#374151;margin-bottom:8px;} /* C233: Issue mention highlight */ .mention-highlight{background:#fef9c3;border-radius:3px;padding:0 2px;font-weight:600;color:#92400e;} /* C234: Done issue strikethrough in list */ .issue-card.status-done .issue-title,.issue-item.status-done .issue-title,.issue-card.status-closed .issue-title{text-decoration:line-through;color:#9ca3af;} /* C235: Quick stats pills at top */ .quick-stats-row{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:8px;} .qs-pill{padding:3px 10px;border-radius:12px;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;} .qs-pill.all{background:#e0e7ff;color:#4338ca;} .qs-pill.urgent{background:#fee2e2;color:#dc2626;} .qs-pill.mine{background:#dcfce7;color:#15803d;} .qs-pill.overdue{background:#fef3c7;color:#b45309;} /* C236: Completed today section */ .completed-today-section{background:#f0fdf4;border:1px solid #bbf7d0;border-radius:8px;padding:10px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:12px;} /* C237: Note tag in search results */ .note-tag{font-size:10px;background:#fef9c3;color:#92400e;border-radius:4px;padding:1px 5px;} /* C238: Keyboard indicator dots */ .active-shortcut-dot{position:fixed;bottom:28px;right:50%;transform:translateX(50%);font-size:10px;color:#9ca3af;background:rgba(255,255,255,.8);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:8px;z-index:7001;} /* === Cycle 241-250 Combined CSS === */ /* C241: Issue lock indicator */ .issue-locked-badge{font-size:10px;background:#fef3c7;color:#b45309;border-radius:6px;padding:1px 6px;font-weight:600;} /* C242: Attachment count badge */ .attachment-count{font-size:10px;color:#6b7280;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;} /* C243: Custom field chips */ .custom-field-chip{font-size:10px;background:#f3f4f6;color:#374151;border-radius:8px;padding:1px 6px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;} /* C244: Status flow arrows */ .status-flow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:11px;color:#6b7280;} .status-flow .sf-arrow{color:#9ca3af;} /* C245: Mobile touch swipe hint */ .swipe-hint{display:none;font-size:11px;color:#9ca3af;text-align:center;padding:4px;} @media(max-width:640px){.swipe-hint{display:block;}} /* C248: Issue count per label */ .label-count-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:11px;} .label-count-row:hover{background:#f9fafb;} /* C249: Live edit mode */ .live-edit-mode .issue-title{cursor:text;} .live-edit-mode .issue-title:hover{outline:1px dashed #818cf8;border-radius:3px;} /* C250: Mega header metrics */ .mega-metric-card{background:#fff;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:10px;padding:12px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;text-align:center;} .mega-metric-val{font-size:24px;font-weight:800;color:#6366f1;} .mega-metric-label{font-size:11px;color:#9ca3af;} .mega-metric-change{font-size:10px;} .mega-metric-change.up{color:#15803d;} .mega-metric-change.down{color:#dc2626;} /* === Cycle 251-260 Combined CSS === */ /* C251: Hover tooltip on metrics */ .hm-item[title]:hover::after{content:attr(title);position:absolute;bottom:calc(100% + 6px);left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);background:#1f2937;color:#fff;font-size:10px;padding:3px 7px;border-radius:5px;white-space:nowrap;pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;} .hm-item{position:relative;} /* C252: Issue card focus ring for keyboard */ .issue-card:focus,.issue-item:focus{outline:2px solid #818cf8;outline-offset:2px;border-radius:inherit;} /* C255: Sprint completion percentage badge */ .sprint-pct-badge{font-size:12px;font-weight:800;color:#059669;background:#ecfdf5;border:1px solid #a7f3d0;border-radius:8px;padding:2px 8px;} /* C256: Sticky filter bar */ .filter-bar,[class*="filter-bar"]{position:sticky;top:0;z-index:100;background:#fff;border-bottom:1px solid #f3f4f6;padding:6px 8px;} /* C258: Tag search in filter bar */ .tag-search-input{font-size:12px;padding:3px 8px;border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:6px;width:120px;} /* C260: Overlay loading spinner */ .dashboard-loading{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(255,255,255,.8);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:99999;backdrop-filter:blur(4px);} .dl-spinner{width:40px;height:40px;border:4px solid #e5e7eb;border-top-color:#6366f1;border-radius:50%;animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite;} @keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}} /* === Cycle 261-270 === */ /* C261: Pulse on urgent cards */ .issue-card[data-priority="urgent"],.priority-urgent{animation:urgentPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;} @keyframes urgentPulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.1)}50%{box-shadow:0 1px 3px rgba(239,68,68,.3),0 0 0 2px rgba(239,68,68,.1)}} /* C263: Issue card source reference */ .source-ref{font-size:10px;color:#9ca3af;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;} /* C265: Column headers in table view */ .issue-table-header{display:flex;padding:6px 12px;background:#f9fafb;border-bottom:2px solid #e5e7eb;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;color:#6b7280;gap:8px;} .ith-col{overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;} /* C267: Stats comparison */ .stat-compare-badge{font-size:10px;background:#f3f4f6;color:#6b7280;border-radius:5px;padding:1px 5px;} .stat-compare-badge.better{background:#dcfce7;color:#15803d;} .stat-compare-badge.worse{background:#fee2e2;color:#dc2626;} /* === Cycle 271-280 === */ .issue-divider{border:none;border-top:1px dashed #e5e7eb;margin:4px 0;} .top-n-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:6px;} .section-expand-btn{font-size:11px;color:#6366f1;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:none;} .filter-active-indicator{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:#6366f1;display:inline-block;margin-right:3px;} .priority-rank-num{font-size:10px;color:#9ca3af;font-weight:700;min-width:16px;} /* C281: Score Heatmap */ #_heatmapPanel { position:fixed; bottom:160px; right:20px; background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:10px; padding:14px; width:280px; z-index:2000; display:none; } #_heatmapPanel h4 { margin:0 0 10px; font-size:12px; color:#aaa; } ._hmRow { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; margin-bottom:3px; } ._hmLabel { font-size:10px; color:#aaa; width:60px; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; } ._hmCell { width:32px; height:22px; border-radius:4px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:10px; font-weight:700; color:#fff; } #_heatmapToggleBtn { position:fixed; bottom:160px; right:310px; background:#7c3aed; color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:20px; padding:6px 12px; font-size:11px; cursor:pointer; z-index:2001; } /* C282: Time Comparison Bars */ ._timeCompBar { margin-top:6px; } ._timeCompRow { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; margin-bottom:3px; font-size:10px; } ._timeCompLabel { width:70px; color:#888; white-space:nowrap; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; } ._timeCompTrack { flex:1; height:8px; background:#333; border-radius:4px; overflow:hidden; position:relative; } ._timeCompEst { height:100%; background:#3b82f6; border-radius:4px; } ._timeCompAct { position:absolute; top:0; height:100%; background:#f97316; border-radius:4px; opacity:0.7; } /* C283: Quick Status Emoji */ ._statusEmoji { display:inline-flex; gap:4px; margin-top:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; } ._sEmojiBtn { background:#2a2a3a; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:20px; padding:2px 8px; font-size:12px; cursor:pointer; transition:all 0.15s; user-select:none; } ._sEmojiBtn:hover { background:#3a3a4e; transform:scale(1.1); } ._sEmojiBtn.active { background:#7c3aed; border-color:#7c3aed; } ._sEmojiBtn .cnt { font-size:10px; color:#aaa; margin-left:2px; } /* C284: Full KB Cheatsheet */ #_kbCheatsheet { position:fixed; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%); background:#1a1a2e; border:1px solid #555; border-radius:16px; padding:24px 28px; z-index:9999; display:none; width:600px; max-height:80vh; overflow-y:auto; box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.7); } #_kbCheatsheet h3 { margin:0 0 16px; font-size:16px; color:#fff; } ._kbSection { margin-bottom:14px; } ._kbSection h4 { font-size:11px; color:#7c3aed; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px; margin:0 0 6px; } ._kbGrid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr; gap:4px 16px; } ._kbItem { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; font-size:11px; color:#ccc; } ._kbKey { background:#2a2a3a; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:4px; padding:1px 6px; font-family:monospace; color:#fff; font-size:10px; white-space:nowrap; } #_kbCheatsheetOverlay { position:fixed; inset:0; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.5); z-index:9998; display:none; } /* C285: Age Distribution Chart */ #_ageDistPanel { display:none; position:fixed; top:60px; right:20px; background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:10px; padding:14px; width:260px; z-index:2000; } #_ageDistPanel h4 { margin:0 0 10px; font-size:12px; color:#aaa; } ._ageBar { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; margin-bottom:4px; font-size:10px; } ._ageBarLabel { width:50px; color:#888; text-align:right; } ._ageBarFill { height:14px; background:#6366f1; border-radius:3px; min-width:2px; transition:width 0.3s; } ._ageBarCount { color:#ccc; } /* C287: Standup Progress Ring */ #_standupRing { position:fixed; top:110px; left:20px; background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:50%; width:64px; height:64px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; z-index:1500; cursor:pointer; transition:transform 0.2s; } #_standupRing:hover { transform:scale(1.1); } #_standupRing .pct { font-size:14px; font-weight:700; color:#22c55e; } #_standupRing .lbl { font-size:8px; color:#888; } /* C290: Collapsible Description */ ._descCollapsed { max-height:80px; overflow:hidden; position:relative; } ._descCollapsed::after { content:''; position:absolute; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; height:30px; background:linear-gradient(transparent, #1a1a2e); } ._descShowMore { background:none; border:1px solid #444; color:#7c3aed; border-radius:4px; padding:3px 10px; font-size:11px; cursor:pointer; margin-top:4px; } ._descShowMore:hover { background:#2a2a3a; } /* C291: Focus Sound Toggle */ #_ambientSoundBtn { position:fixed; bottom:200px; right:20px; background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:50%; width:44px; height:44px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:18px; cursor:pointer; z-index:1500; transition:all 0.2s; } #_ambientSoundBtn:hover { background:#2a2a3a; transform:scale(1.05); } #_ambientSoundBtn.playing { border-color:#22c55e; background:#0a2010; } /* C292: Team Color Coding */ [data-team="FE"] .issue-card, [data-team="FE"].issue-card { border-left:3px solid #3b82f6 !important; } [data-team="BE"] .issue-card, [data-team="BE"].issue-card { border-left:3px solid #22c55e !important; } [data-team="QA"] .issue-card, [data-team="QA"].issue-card { border-left:3px solid #f59e0b !important; } [data-team="DS"] .issue-card, [data-team="DS"].issue-card { border-left:3px solid #a855f7 !important; } ._teamDot { display:inline-block; width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; margin-right:4px; } /* C293: Quick Filter Pills */ #_quickFilterBar { display:flex; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; padding:8px 0 4px; margin-bottom:4px; } ._qfPill { background:#2a2a3a; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:20px; padding:3px 10px; font-size:11px; cursor:pointer; color:#ccc; transition:all 0.15s; user-select:none; } ._qfPill:hover { background:#3a3a4e; } ._qfPill.active { background:#7c3aed; border-color:#7c3aed; color:#fff; } /* C294: Sidebar Status Counts */ #_sidebarStatusCounts { margin:12px 0; } #_sidebarStatusCounts h5 { font-size:10px; color:#888; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px; margin:0 0 6px; } ._sscRow { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; padding:3px 0; font-size:11px; border-bottom:1px solid #2a2a3a; } ._sscLabel { color:#aaa; } ._sscCount { font-weight:700; color:#fff; } /* C296: Milestone Tracker */ #_milestonePanel { display:none; position:fixed; top:50%; right:20px; transform:translateY(-50%); background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:12px; padding:16px; width:220px; z-index:2000; } #_milestonePanel h4 { margin:0 0 10px; font-size:12px; color:#aaa; } ._msItem { margin-bottom:8px; } ._msTitle { font-size:11px; color:#ccc; font-weight:600; } ._msBar { height:6px; background:#333; border-radius:3px; margin-top:3px; overflow:hidden; } ._msFill { height:100%; background:#7c3aed; border-radius:3px; transition:width 0.4s; } ._msPct { font-size:10px; color:#888; text-align:right; } /* C298: Due Countdown Badge */ ._dueCountdown { display:inline-block; font-size:9px; padding:1px 5px; border-radius:3px; font-weight:700; margin-left:4px; } ._dueCountdown.urgent { background:#ef4444; color:#fff; } ._dueCountdown.warn { background:#f97316; color:#fff; } ._dueCountdown.ok { background:#22c55e; color:#fff; } ._dueCountdown.past { background:#7c3aed; color:#fff; } /* C299: Search History Dropdown */ #_searchHistoryDrop { position:absolute; top:100%; left:0; right:0; background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:8px; z-index:5000; overflow:hidden; display:none; } ._shHistItem { padding:7px 12px; font-size:12px; color:#ccc; cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; } ._shHistItem:hover { background:#2a2a3a; } ._shHistIcon { color:#888; font-size:11px; } /* C300: Mega Milestone Banner */ @keyframes _c300Pulse { 0%,100%{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1)} 50%{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.03)} } #_c300Banner { position:fixed; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%); background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#4f46e5,#0ea5e9); color:#fff; padding:24px 40px; border-radius:20px; font-size:20px; font-weight:800; z-index:99999; text-align:center; box-shadow:0 20px 60px rgba(124,58,237,0.6); animation:_c300Pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; display:none; } /* C302: Comment Unread Badge */ ._commentUnread { display:inline-block; background:#ef4444; color:#fff; border-radius:10px; font-size:9px; font-weight:700; padding:0 5px; margin-left:3px; animation:_pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; } /* C306: Drag Status Drop Zones */ #_dropZoneBar { display:none; position:fixed; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; height:60px; z-index:9000; display:flex; } ._dropZone { flex:1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5); border-top:2px solid transparent; transition:all 0.2s; } ._dropZone[data-status="Open"] { background:rgba(59,130,246,0.1); border-color:#3b82f6; } ._dropZone[data-status="In Progress"] { background:rgba(249,115,22,0.1); border-color:#f97316; } ._dropZone[data-status="Closed"] { background:rgba(34,197,94,0.1); border-color:#22c55e; } ._dropZone.drag-over { background:rgba(124,58,237,0.2) !important; border-color:#7c3aed !important; color:#fff; } #_dropZoneBar { display:none; } /* C307: Sprint Goal Header Ring */ #_sprintGoalRing { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; font-size:11px; color:#aaa; } #_sprintGoalRing svg { width:32px; height:32px; transform:rotate(-90deg); } #_sprintGoalRing circle { fill:none; stroke-width:4; } #_sprintGoalRing .bg { stroke:#333; } #_sprintGoalRing .fg { stroke:#7c3aed; stroke-linecap:round; transition:stroke-dashoffset 0.5s; } /* C309: Back to Top Button */ #_backToTopBtn { position:fixed; bottom:80px; right:20px; background:#4f46e5; color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:50%; width:40px; height:40px; font-size:18px; cursor:pointer; z-index:1500; opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.3s; pointer-events:none; box-shadow:0 4px 12px rgba(79,70,229,0.4); } #_backToTopBtn.visible { opacity:1; pointer-events:all; } #_backToTopBtn:hover { background:#6366f1; } /* C310: Velocity Trend Mini Chart */ #_velocityTrendPanel { margin:10px 0; } #_velocityTrendPanel h5 { font-size:10px; color:#888; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px; margin:0 0 4px; } ._vtBar { display:inline-block; background:#4f46e5; width:8px; border-radius:2px 2px 0 0; margin:0 1px; vertical-align:bottom; transition:height 0.3s; } ._vtDay { display:inline-block; width:10px; text-align:center; font-size:8px; color:#555; } /* C311: Collapsible Sidebar Sections */ ._collapsibleHeader { cursor:pointer; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:space-between; padding:4px 0; user-select:none; } ._collapsibleHeader::after { content:'▾'; font-size:10px; color:#888; transition:transform 0.2s; } ._collapsibleHeader.collapsed::after { transform:rotate(-90deg); } ._collapsibleBody { transition:max-height 0.3s, opacity 0.3s; overflow:hidden; } ._collapsibleBody.hidden { max-height:0 !important; opacity:0; } /* C312: Card Hover Actions */ .issue-card:hover ._hoverActions, .issue-item:hover ._hoverActions { opacity:1 !important; pointer-events:all !important; } ._hoverActions { opacity:0; pointer-events:none; position:absolute; top:4px; right:4px; display:flex; gap:4px; transition:opacity 0.15s; z-index:10; } ._hoverActionBtn { background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:4px; width:24px; height:24px; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:11px; cursor:pointer; } ._hoverActionBtn:hover { background:#2a2a3a; } .issue-card, .issue-item { position:relative; } /* C313: Detail Loading Skeleton */ ._detailSkeleton { animation:_shimmer 1.5s infinite linear; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#1e1e2e 25%,#2a2a3a 50%,#1e1e2e 75%); background-size:200% 100%; border-radius:4px; } ._skRow { height:14px; margin:8px 0; border-radius:3px; } ._skRow.wide { width:90%; } ._skRow.med { width:60%; } ._skRow.short { width:35%; } /* C315: Mobile Compact Auto-Adjust */ @media (max-width: 768px) { .issue-card, .issue-item { padding:8px 10px !important; } .issue-card .issue-title, .issue-item .issue-title { font-size:12px !important; } .issue-card .assignee, .issue-item .assignee { font-size:10px !important; } ._hoverActions { opacity:1 !important; pointer-events:all !important; } #_standupRing, #_heatmapToggleBtn { display:none !important; } } @media (max-width: 480px) { .sidebar, #sidebar { width:100% !important; } #issueDetailPanel, .detail-panel { width:100% !important; left:0 !important; } } /* C318: Priority Row Stripes */ .issue-card[data-priority="critical"], .issue-item[data-priority="critical"] { background:linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(239,68,68,0.06) 0%, transparent 40%) !important; } .issue-card[data-priority="high"], .issue-item[data-priority="high"] { background:linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(249,115,22,0.05) 0%, transparent 40%) !important; } .issue-card[data-priority="medium"], .issue-item[data-priority="medium"] { background:linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(234,179,8,0.04) 0%, transparent 40%) !important; } .issue-card[data-priority="low"], .issue-item[data-priority="low"] { background:linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(34,197,94,0.04) 0%, transparent 40%) !important; } /* C321: Lifecycle Timeline */ ._lifeCycle { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:4px; margin:8px 0; } ._lcStep { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:3px; font-size:9px; color:#888; } ._lcDot { width:8px; height:8px; border-radius:50%; background:#333; } ._lcDot.done { background:#22c55e; } ._lcDot.active { background:#7c3aed; animation:_pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; } ._lcArrow { color:#444; font-size:10px; } /* C323: Batch Update Bar */ #_batchUpdateBar { position:fixed; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; background:#1e1e2e; border-top:2px solid #7c3aed; padding:10px 20px; display:none; align-items:center; gap:12px; z-index:5000; } #_batchUpdateBar.active { display:flex; } #_batchUpdateBar select { background:#2a2a3a; border:1px solid #444; color:#ccc; border-radius:6px; padding:4px 8px; font-size:12px; } #_batchUpdateBar button { background:#7c3aed; border:none; color:#fff; border-radius:6px; padding:6px 14px; font-size:12px; cursor:pointer; } #_batchUpdateBar .count { color:#7c3aed; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; } ._bulkCheckbox { width:14px; height:14px; cursor:pointer; margin-right:6px; accent-color:#7c3aed; } /* C326: Filter Count Chips */ ._filterCountChip { display:inline-block; background:#7c3aed; color:#fff; border-radius:10px; font-size:9px; font-weight:700; padding:0 5px; margin-left:3px; min-width:16px; text-align:center; } /* C331: Mini Calendar Widget */ #_miniCalWidget { display:none; position:fixed; top:50%; right:20px; transform:translateY(-50%); background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:12px; padding:14px; width:240px; z-index:2000; } #_miniCalWidget h4 { margin:0 0 10px; font-size:12px; color:#aaa; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center; } ._calGrid { display:grid; grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr); gap:2px; } ._calCell { aspect-ratio:1; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; font-size:10px; color:#888; border-radius:4px; cursor:default; } ._calCell.today { background:#7c3aed; color:#fff; font-weight:700; } ._calCell.hasDue { background:#ef4444; color:#fff; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer; } ._calCell.header { color:#555; font-size:9px; } /* C332: Recent Comments Panel */ #_recentCmtPanel { display:none; position:fixed; top:60px; left:20px; background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:12px; padding:14px; width:260px; max-height:400px; overflow-y:auto; z-index:2000; } #_recentCmtPanel h4 { margin:0 0 10px; font-size:12px; color:#aaa; } ._rcmtItem { padding:6px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #2a2a3a; font-size:11px; } ._rcmtIssue { color:#7c3aed; font-size:10px; cursor:pointer; } ._rcmtText { color:#ccc; margin:2px 0; } ._rcmtMeta { color:#555; font-size:9px; } /* C335: Status Change Animation */ @keyframes _statusFlash { 0%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(124,58,237,0)} 50%{box-shadow:0 0 12px 4px rgba(124,58,237,0.4)} 100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 rgba(124,58,237,0)} } ._statusChanged { animation:_statusFlash 0.8s
