ease; } /* C336: Daily Goal Widget */ #_dailyGoalWidget { position:fixed; bottom:250px; left:10px; background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:10px; padding:10px 14px; width:180px; z-index:1500; display:none; } #_dailyGoalWidget input[type="number"] { background:#2a2a3a; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:4px; color:#fff; padding:3px 8px; width:60px; font-size:12px; } #_dailyGoalProgress { height:6px; background:#333; border-radius:3px; margin-top:4px; } #_dailyGoalProgressBar { height:100%; background:#22c55e; border-radius:3px; transition:width 0.4s; } /* C340: Status Bar */ #_bottomStatusBar { position:fixed; bottom:0; left:0; right:0; height:24px; background:#111; border-top:1px solid #2a2a3a; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:16px; padding:0 16px; z-index:4998; font-size:10px; color:#666; } #_bottomStatusBar .sep { color:#333; } #_bottomStatusBar .item { color:#888; } #_bottomStatusBar .item.red { color:#ef4444; } #_bottomStatusBar .item.green { color:#22c55e; } /* C341: Tag Grouping Panel */ #_tagGroupPanel { margin-bottom:8px; padding:6px; background:#1a1a2e; border-radius:6px; } #_tagGroupPanel .label { font-size:10px; color:#888; margin-bottom:4px; } ._tagGroupBtn { background:#2a2a3a; border:1px solid #444; color:#ccc; border-radius:4px; padding:2px 8px; font-size:10px; cursor:pointer; margin-right:4px; margin-bottom:4px; } ._tagGroupBtn.active { background:#7c3aed; border-color:#7c3aed; color:#fff; } /* C343: Sprint Arc Header */ #_sprintArcHeader { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; margin-left:10px; } #_sprintArcHeader svg { width:36px; height:36px; } #_sprintArcHeader .txt { font-size:11px; color:#aaa; } /* C344: Kbd Hint Toast */ #_kbdHintToast { position:fixed; bottom:30px; left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:20px; padding:4px 14px; font-size:10px; color:#888; z-index:9000; pointer-events:none; opacity:0; transition:opacity 0.3s; } #_kbdHintToast.show { opacity:1; } /* C345: Complexity Indicator */ ._complexityDot { display:inline-flex; gap:2px; margin-left:4px; vertical-align:middle; } ._complexityDot span { width:5px; height:5px; border-radius:50%; background:#333; } ._complexityDot span.filled { background:#7c3aed; } /* C346: My Issues Pulse */ ._myIssuePulse { position:absolute; top:4px; left:4px; width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:50%; background:#22c55e; } ._myIssuePulse::after { content:''; position:absolute; inset:-2px; border-radius:50%; border:1px solid #22c55e; animation:_pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite; } /* C348: Tag Pills Enhanced */ ._tagPill { display:inline-block; background:#2a2a3a; border-radius:12px; padding:1px 7px; font-size:9px; color:#aaa; margin-right:2px; border:1px solid #333; } ._tagPill.bug { border-color:#ef4444; color:#ef4444; } ._tagPill.feature { border-color:#22c55e; color:#22c55e; } ._tagPill.performance { border-color:#f59e0b; color:#f59e0b; } ._tagPill.security { border-color:#7c3aed; color:#7c3aed; } ._tagPill.UI { border-color:#3b82f6; color:#3b82f6; } /* C354: Quick Close Modal */ #_quickCloseModal { display:none; position:fixed; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%); background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:12px; padding:20px; z-index:99999; width:320px; } #_quickCloseModal h4 { margin:0 0 12px; font-size:14px; color:#fff; } #_quickCloseModal textarea { width:100%; background:#2a2a3a; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:6px; color:#ccc; padding:8px; font-size:12px; box-sizing:border-box; min-height:80px; resize:vertical; } #_quickCloseModal select { width:100%; background:#2a2a3a; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:6px; color:#ccc; padding:6px; font-size:12px; margin-bottom:8px; } /* C355: Responsive Header Collapse */ @media (max-width: 900px) { header .header-actions, .header .header-actions { display:none; } #_tsvExportBtn, #_customExportBtn { display:none !important; } #_sprintArcHeader .txt { display:none; } } @media (max-width: 600px) { header, .header, .app-header { flex-wrap:wrap; height:auto !important; padding:8px !important; } #_sprintGoalRing, #_sprintArcHeader { display:none !important; } } /* C361: Issue Timeline Bar */ ._timelineBar { margin:8px 0; } ._tlTrack { position:relative; height:8px; background:#2a2a3a; border-radius:4px; } ._tlFill { position:absolute; height:100%; border-radius:4px; top:0; background:#3b82f6; } ._tlDue { position:absolute; top:-3px; width:3px; height:14px; background:#ef4444; border-radius:2px; } ._tlToday { position:absolute; top:-3px; width:2px; height:14px; background:#22c55e; border-radius:2px; } ._tlLabel { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; font-size:9px; color:#555; margin-top:2px; } /* C362: Sticky Filter Bar */ .filter-bar, .filters, [class*="filter-bar"] { position:sticky !important; top:0; z-index:200; background:#0f0f1a !important; box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); } /* C367: Form Validation */ .field-error { border-color:#ef4444 !important; box-shadow:0 0 0 2px rgba(239,68,68,0.2); } .field-error-msg { color:#ef4444; font-size:10px; margin-top:2px; } .field-valid { border-color:#22c55e !important; } /* C371: Category Icon Filter */ #_catIconFilter { display:flex; gap:6px; flex-wrap:wrap; padding:6px 0; } ._catBtn { background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #333; border-radius:8px; padding:4px 10px; font-size:12px; cursor:pointer; color:#aaa; transition:all 0.15s; } ._catBtn:hover { background:#2a2a3a; } ._catBtn.active { background:#4f46e5; border-color:#4f46e5; color:#fff; } /* C372: Sidebar Drag Hint */ .sidebar-section, [class*="sidebar"] h4, [class*="sidebar"] h5 { cursor:grab; } .sidebar-section:active { cursor:grabbing; opacity:0.8; } /* C396: Team Capacity Bar */ #_teamCapacity { margin:10px 0; } #_teamCapacity h5 { font-size:10px; color:#888; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:1px; margin:0 0 4px; } ._tcRow { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; margin-bottom:3px; font-size:10px; } ._tcName { width:55px; color:#aaa; overflow:hidden; text-overflow:ellipsis; white-space:nowrap; } ._tcBar { flex:1; height:6px; background:#333; border-radius:3px; overflow:hidden; } ._tcFill { height:100%; border-radius:3px; } ._tcCount { color:#666; width:20px; text-align:right; } /* C400: Grand Finale Burst */ @keyframes _c400Rainbow { 0%{filter:hue-rotate(0deg)} 100%{filter:hue-rotate(360deg)} } #_c400Toast { display:none; position:fixed; top:50%; left:50%; transform:translate(-50%,-50%); z-index:99999; text-align:center; animation:_c400Rainbow 3s linear infinite; } #_c400Toast .main { background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#0ea5e9,#22c55e); -webkit-background-clip:text; -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent; font-size:28px; font-weight:900; } /* C402: Search Suggestions */ #_searchSuggestions402 { position:absolute; top:100%; left:0; right:0; background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:8px; z-index:5001; display:none; max-height:200px; overflow-y:auto; } ._searchSug402 { padding:6px 12px; font-size:11px; color:#ccc; cursor:pointer; border-bottom:1px solid #2a2a3a; } ._searchSug402:hover { background:#2a2a3a; } ._searchSug402 .highlight { color:#7c3aed; font-weight:700; } /* C408: Card Hover Polish */ .issue-card, .issue-item { transition: transform 0.12s ease, box-shadow 0.12s ease !important; } .issue-card:hover, .issue-item:hover { transform: translateY(-1px) !important; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.3) !important; } /* C414: Status Gauge */ #_statusGauge { margin:10px 0; display:flex; height:8px; border-radius:4px; overflow:hidden; gap:1px; } ._sgSeg { height:100%; transition:width 0.5s; } #_statusGaugeLabels { display:flex; gap:8px; margin-top:2px; font-size:9px; } ._sgLabel { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:3px; color:#888; } ._sgDot { width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:50%; } /* C416: Sticky Notes */ #_stickyNotes { position:fixed; top:70px; right:20px; z-index:1600; display:none; } ._stickyNote { background:#fef08a; color:#333; padding:10px; border-radius:4px; margin-bottom:6px; font-size:11px; width:160px; box-shadow:2px 2px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.3); position:relative; } ._stickyNote textarea { background:transparent; border:none; width:100%; resize:none; font-size:11px; color:#333; outline:none; } ._stickyNote .del { position:absolute; top:2px; right:4px; cursor:pointer; color:#999; font-size:10px; } /* C421: Sprint Health Widget */ #_sprintHealthWidget { position:fixed; bottom:90px; left:10px; background:#1e1e2e; border:1px solid #444; border-radius:10px; padding:10px 14px; width:160px; z-index:1500; font-size:10px; } #_sprintHealthWidget h5 { margin:0 0 6px; color:#888; font-size:9px; text-transform:uppercase; } ._shMetric { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; padding:2px 0; color:#aaa; border-bottom:1px solid #2a2a3a; } ._shVal { font-weight:700; color:#fff; } /* C437: Mobile Touch Targets */ @media (max-width: 768px) { button, .btn, input[type="checkbox"] { min-height:44px; min-width:44px; } ._bulkCheckbox { width:20px; height:20px; } ._qfPill { padding:8px 14px; font-size:13px; } } /* C439: Detail Panel Slide-In */ @keyframes _slideInRight { from{transform:translateX(100%);opacity:0} to{transform:translateX(0);opacity:1} } #issueDetailPanel, .detail-panel { animation:_slideInRight 0.25s ease; } #issueDetailPanel.closing, .detail-panel.closing { animation:none; transition:transform 0.2s ease,opacity 0.2s ease; transform:translateX(100%); opacity:0; }
